# Crypto Futures Profit Calculator - llms.txt
# https://coin-profit-calculator.vercel.app

> Crypto Futures Profit Calculator is a free, comprehensive cryptocurrency futures trading calculator that helps traders calculate profits, losses, liquidation prices, and position sizes for leveraged crypto trading.

## Features

### Profit & Loss Calculator
- Calculate potential profits and losses for long and short positions
- Support for up to 125x leverage
- Real-time margin and ROI calculations
- Multiple cryptocurrency pairs supported (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, and more)

### Liquidation Price Calculator
- Calculate exact liquidation prices for leveraged positions
- Cross margin and isolated margin support
- Risk assessment before entering trades

### Position Size Calculator
- Calculate optimal position sizes based on risk tolerance
- Risk-reward ratio optimization
- Maximum leverage recommendations

### Supported Exchanges
- Binance Futures
- Bybit
- OKX
- Bitget
- And more perpetual futures exchanges

## Use Cases
- Pre-trade profit/loss estimation for crypto futures
- Risk management and position sizing
- Liquidation price awareness before entering trades
- Leverage impact analysis
- Portfolio risk assessment

## Languages
- English (en) - Primary
- Korean (ko) - Full translation

## Technical Details
- Client-side calculations (no data sent to servers)
- Real-time cryptocurrency price feeds
- Mobile-responsive design
- PWA support

## Structured Data
- JSON-LD: WebApplication, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList schemas
- Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata
- Speakable markup for voice assistants

## Sitemap
- /sitemap.xml
- /robots.txt

## Contact
Website: https://coin-profit-calculator.vercel.app
